MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: G.Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Terminating Sanctions, And In The Alternative, To Further Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore specially appearing for Andrew Rundquist of Legal Recovery Law Offices, Inc. telephone number 800-785-4001 for Plaintiff.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion Terminating Sanctions, And In The Alternative, To Further Compel Response To Discovery is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE to refiling. No opposition was filed, however, the plaintiff's declaration was insufficient to support the request for terminating sanctions.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted is GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
